name: Mexican Chocolate Wedding Cakes
recipeIngredient: 3 1 oz squares unsweetened baking chocolate, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine brown sugar and butter.
3. Beat at medium speed until creamy, scraping the bowl often, for about 1-2 minutes.
4. Add melted baking chocolate and vanilla extract. Continue beating until well mixed, for another 1-2 minutes.
5. Reduce speed to low and add all remaining ingredients except powdered sugar. Mix until well combined, for about 1-2 minutes.
6. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Place the balls 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until set.
9. Let stand 5 minutes before carefully removing from the cookie sheets.
10. Cool another 5 minutes, then roll in powdered sugar while still warm and again when cool.
